fullTestimonials.quote: Working with Jeanne Marie came at a pivotal moment for Explore Austin. I needed to guide my board through complex decisions around land acquisition and building a future headquarters, and I wanted to do it thoughtfully, as it was the largest endeavor the organization had ever considered. Jeanne Marie met my needs with both expertise and care. Her background in public-private partnerships and bringing large projects to life is impressive, but what was most meaningful was how she showed up as a partner. She helped me think clearly, ask better questions, and shape a story that felt grounded. Jeanne Marie has a rare ability to combine strategic insight with genuine care for the people and projects she’s working with - I’m grateful for her partnership.
fullTestimonials.name: Kathleen Schneeman
fullTestimonials.title: Executive Director, Explore Austin

fullTestimonials.quote: Working with Jeanne Marie Ellis has been transformative for our Foundation. Her deep industry knowledge and strategic guidance didn’t just help us grow; they positioned us to become entirely self-sustaining. Beyond the logistics of grant applications and board communications, she is an invaluable thought partner. She has turned what used to be a ‘heavy lift’ into a ‘light touch,’ allowing our leadership to focus on our mission while she handles the complexities with ease.
fullTestimonials.name: Tammy Becker
fullTestimonials.title: Deputy Executive Director, Academic Services, Education Service Center Region 12

fullTestimonials.quote: Working with Jeanne Marie has been a true gift! She brings a rare level of emotional intelligence to her work--consistently reading the room with accuracy and navigating even the most complex dynamics with grace and ease. Her presence fosters trust, clarity, and forward momentum, making collaboration feel both productive and deeply supportive. Jeanne Marie has a unique ability to balance strategic insight with genuine care for people, and it shows in every interaction.
fullTestimonials.name: Laura Buckley
fullTestimonials.title: Asst. Superintendent of Student Services, Jarrell ISD

fullTestimonials.quote: Jeanne Marie has been an incredible support to both my organization as a whole and me as a leader, through seasons of both complex challenges and exciting growth. She has a gift for looking at the big picture and supporting organizations in setting and tackling the most pressing priorities, while also recognizing the importance of serving and honoring the humans at the center of any mission. It has been a gift to have a trustworthy support like Jeanne Marie, who can move through so many facets of an organization and provide salient, steady feedback and ideas. It is a rare gift, and we are grateful to have her expertise impact our work at Red Oak Hope!
fullTestimonials.name: Haley Patterson
fullTestimonials.title: Executive Director, Red Oak Hope

fullTestimonials.quote: Jeanne Marie brings the calm to a storm of uncertainty. Her years of experience and expertise have helped grow our foundation from a dream into a solid and sustainable entity that is focused on those we serve with structure to be easily managed and funded to support decades of give-back to area children. She has guided us in documentation creation and updates, mission identification and clarity, and the in and out of general management for gifts and grants. I can’t recommend her highly enough! Anyone would benefit from her partnership and consultation.
fullTestimonials.name: Alexis Neumann, Ph.D.
fullTestimonials.title: Superintendent, Rapoport Academy

fullTestimonials.quote: Working with Jeanne Marie Ellis has been a transformative experience for our nonprofit. When we first engaged her services, we were a small organization with a big vision but needed a concrete roadmap to scale our impact. Jeanne Marie didn’t just provide a consultant’s report; she provided a masterclass in Advancement Strategy. What sets Jeanne Marie apart is her ability to live up to her tagline: “Our mission is advancing yours.” She has an uncanny knack for grounding every piece of advice in our core values while simultaneously pushing us toward a higher standard of professional success. Jeanne Marie is more than a consultant; she is a dedicated partner in progress. For any nonprofit, school, or municipality looking to bridge the gap between their current reality and their ultimate potential, I cannot recommend the JME Group highly enough. She doesn’t just show you the path--she helps you build it.
fullTestimonials.name: Jody DeSantis
fullTestimonials.title: Treasurer, Board of Directors, Bolivar Point Lighthouse Foundation

fullTestimonials.quote: Jeanne Marie Ellis has served as a consultant for our organization for over eight years, and her impact has been invaluable. Her kindness, dedication, and passion for our work are evident in everything she does. She is incredibly detail-oriented and works tirelessly to ensure we remain in full compliance, giving us great confidence and peace of mind. Jeanne Marie truly cares about our mission and consistently goes above and beyond to support it. I would highly recommend her to any nonprofit looking for a knowledgeable, dependable, and mission-driven consultant. She is a joy to work with!
fullTestimonials.name: Ronda Johnson
fullTestimonials.title: Executive Director, Team Luke Hope for Minds

fullTestimonials.quote: After 20 successful years of working together to help me create positive public relations, build non-profit foundations and apply her special gift for gathering the right people around the right mission, Jeanne Marie Ellis remains a colleague, friend, and key part of my work. During my time as a school superintendent, executive director of ESC Region 12 and now as an education consultant, her skill, integrity and rock-solid commitment to her clients remain invaluable to my work. I can’t imagine working with anyone else!
fullTestimonials.name: Jerry Maze, Ed.D.
fullTestimonials.title: Owner/CEO, Maze Education Associates

fullTestimonials.quote: As the Board Chair of a nonprofit organization undergoing a CEO/Founder transition, we hired Jeanne Marie Ellis as the Interim CEO to guide us through the process. Her leadership proved truly game-changing in facilitating a successful transition. Jeanne Marie’s collaborative approach and executive leadership skills were key in resetting the organization and positioning it to move forward. Her ability to swiftly establish supportive and constructive relationships with the team and board was pivotal. She led with kindness, grace, clarity, and professional directness. Jeanne Marie’s comprehensive approach to the organization’s various areas, both local and international, enabled us to navigate the transition effectively. She developed a solid and detailed plan of execution, ensuring a smooth transition to a state of forward-looking stability and organizational health. Furthermore, and key, Jeanne Marie’s teaching mindset and expertise provided the new organization’s leadership with a strong foundation and the necessary knowledge and confidence to achieve future success. Today, the organization has experienced significant improvements in operations and budgeting, and is executing its goals due to her guidance, wisdom and expertise.
fullTestimonials.name: Kathy Smith-Willman
fullTestimonials.title: Past Board Chair, Red Oak Hope

mission.lead: Every day, our clients transform lives through meaningful work in education, community development, healthcare, youth and family services, recreation -- the list goes on and on.
body: Each one of them has a unique mission, but they all have two things in common: they make a difference in their community, and they can prove it. How? Through an intentional, measurable approach to advancing their mission.

Mission advancement requires the use of best practices, hard work, persistence, and a healthy sense of humor. We're here to help you make the decisions today that will expand your community impact tomorrow.
ctaQuestions: What strategies will drive your mission forward?
How will you measure your impact?

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.intro: Advancement is achieved through purposeful planning and hard work.
approach.principlesLead: We help you build the foundation for lasting advancement:
principles: A mission that is relevant and meaningful
Work that is valued by the community you serve
Trust between your organization and its stakeholders
A track record of keeping promises to your community

pillars.title: Active Listening
pillars.description: Every client, every situation and every community is unique. Our first objective is to understand the specific needs of your organization within the context of your community.

pillars.title: Custom Solutions
pillars.description: We create solutions that precisely fit your organization by applying proven best practices to your specific needs.

services.name: Strategic Planning
services.description: Your community deserves a clear path forward. Our straightforward strategic planning process delivers a functional road map for your future.
deliverables: Current strategic plan review and evaluation
“Gaps” analysis
Strategic plan facilitation
A relevant, logical plan you will actually use -- with measurable strategies

services.name: Resource Development
services.description: Stewardship matters deeply to your work, and your resources deserve a sustainable strategy behind them. Our proven methods for resource development deliver effective results.
deliverables: A reliable system for annual and capital giving
A larger, more committed donor base
Diversified funding streams
A broader network of strategic alliances
An intentional process for board development
An engaged board that understands the job
Results-driven committees and task forces
More volunteers delivering your mission
Facility/program development

services.name: Community Relations
services.description: Your story deserves to be heard. Our process strengthens the relationship between your organization and your stakeholders, building the credibility that drives sustainability and growth.
deliverables: Successful methods for sharing your story
Broader understanding and support for your cause
An image boost
Stronger relationships with your stakeholders

services.name: Community Impact
services.description: Our ultimate goal is to advance your mission. We will collaborate with you to:
deliverables: Leverage and build on existing strengths
Identify and seize opportunities
Develop a plan that is relevant and measurable
Steward existing resources more effectively
Cultivate strategic alliances and other resources
Solve or minimize existing setbacks
Avoid future obstacles

about.name: Jeanne Marie Ellis
about.lead: A boutique firm in Austin specializing in advancement strategies for nonprofit organizations. Customized solutions for strategic planning, resource development, and community relations.
bio: Jeanne Marie holds a bachelor's degree in Public Relations from Texas Tech University. Her career spans over three decades and includes strategic planning, nonprofit operations, public relations, marketing, financial development, volunteer development and facility development.
She co-authored a national study for the YMCA called Doing More Together, which explores the rising trends among municipalities partnering with YMCAs to address specific community needs.
Jeanne Marie and her husband, Tom, have two grown children. They attend Austin Christian Fellowship, where she serves on the Missions Leadership Team.

contact.intro: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to start a conversation about advancing your mission.
